alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a benzene ring bearing a carboxylic acid group at ring carbon atoms 1 and 2.
alternative_parents.name: M-phthalic acid and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a sulfonic acid or a derivative thereof that is linked to a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a benzenesulfonyl group, which consists of a monocyclic benzene moiety that carries a sulfonyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: An arylsulfonic acid carrying the sulfonic acid group at the 1-position, and no substitute at the 2-position of the aromatic ring.
alternative_parents.name: 1-sulfo,2-unsubstituted aromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the sulfonyl group, with the general structure RS(=O)2R' ( R,R' must not be H).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfonyls

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the sulfonic acid group, which has the general structure RS(=O)2OH (R is not a hydrogen atom).
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfonic acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxyl group that is esterified with a methyl group. They have the general structure RC(=O)OR', where R=H or organyl group and R'=methyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Methyl esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic salts of an alkali metal. The alkali metal atom is usually in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic alkali metal salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as m-phthalate esters. These are ester derivatives of m-phthalic acids, which are based on a benzene 1,3-dicarboxylic acid skeleton.

direct_parent.description: Ester derivatives of m-phthalic acids, which are based on a benzene 1,3-dicarboxylic acid skeleton.
direct_parent.name: m-Phthalate esters

intermediate_nodes.description: Compounds containing a phthalic acid moiety (or a derivative thereof), which is a benzene ring bearing a carboxylic acid group at two different ring positions. Isomers of phthalic acid include meta-phthalic acid (benzene-1,3-dioic acid), ortho-phthalic acid (benzene-1,2-dioic acid), and para-phthalic acid (benzene-1,4-dioic acid).
intermediate_nodes.name: Phthalic acid and derivatives

intermediate_nodes.description: Ester derivatives of phthalic acids, which are based on a benzene dicarboxylic acid skeleton.
intermediate_nodes.name: Phthalate esters

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxylic acid substituent attached to a benzene ring.
subclass.name: Benzoic acids and derivatives

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
